title: Participant Journal Fragment
description: A partially completed reflective journal containing fragmented observations, emotional responses, and unanswered questions.
discussionPrompts: Which observations appear objective versus interpretive?
What information might still be missing?
How confident is your group in its current interpretation?

facilitatorNotes.guidance: Encourage learners to distinguish between evidence and assumption.
facilitatorNotes.reflectionFocus: Comfort with uncertainty and iterative interpretation
